title: Cobblemon Pogwarts
description: Cobblemon Server for friends and fam
body:
This modpack is built around Cobblemon, a Fabric-based Pokémon-inspired mod for Minecraft that blends the blocky survival world with deep creature-collecting gameplay. At its core, Cobblemon lets players encounter, capture, train, and battle Pokémon-like creatures seamlessly within Minecraft’s natural environments.

Several addons expand this foundation. Cobblemon Alpha Project and Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn enhance combat experiences and mechanics, adding new layers of strategy to battles. Cobblemon Pokenav provides players with a convenient interface for navigation, tracking, and management of their teams. Cobblepedia acts as an in-game Pokédex, giving lore, stats, and detailed information about every creature encountered. Cobblemon Size Variations introduces unique physical differences, making each Pokémon feel distinct, while Cobblemon Ride On! lets players mount and traverse the world atop their Pokémon.

World-building is enriched with Cobblemon: Legends Untold, which generates legendary structures and adds exploration challenges to seek rare creatures. Utility mods like Just Enough Items (JEI), Patchouli, and Fabric API ensure smoother gameplay, crafting guidance, and documentation. Supporting frameworks such as Architectury API and TSFlareon’s Item Core provide backend functionality to keep everything stable and compatible.

Together, this pack delivers a polished, immersive Pokémon-in-Minecraft adventure—balancing creature collecting, exploration, and survival with both casual and competitive playstyles.
